# Contributing to SpiritSafe

SpiritSafe is currently in a reboot phase.

## Reboot Contribution Policy

- Pull requests target main.
- Manual maintainer review is not required in this phase.
- Non-draft pull requests are configured for squash auto-merge once CI passes.

## Scope During Reboot

- Introduce or revise profile package structure under profiles/.
- Update shared queries under queries/.
- Update CI/workflow support for the new ontology-driven SpiritSafe model.

## Baseline Validation

CI validates YAML syntax and basic profile package shape for profile directories present in the pull request.
